wins: NIKE brand grew this quarter with strong mix
Running grew over 20% for the second quarter in a row
NIKE Digital reduced promotional activity and is operating more strategically
Inventory is in a healthy and clean position in North America and EMEA
risks: China continues to face headwinds with revenue declining 16%
Gross margins declined 300 basis points to 40.6%
Tariffs added a significant headwind to overcome
Inventory obsolescence in Greater China impacted margins
Headwinds in Greater China and Converse are expected to continue
